text_overlays.content_summary: بارنز يحتفل معكم بمناسبة اليوم الوطني 94 — Barns celebrates with you on National Day 94
50% خصم على المشروبات الحارة والباردة يوم 23 سبتمبر فقط
Terms and conditions in Arabic and English

notable_visual_elements: Saudi astronaut = Vision 2030 national pride symbol (Saudi space program)
Camel with sunglasses = playful modern Saudi identity
Maamoul brand collab visible — cross-brand Saudi national day partnership
Illustration style creates warmth and festivity without photography cost

cultural_notes.free_notes: The illustrated elements form a deliberate Saudi cultural vocabulary: camel (heritage), astronaut (future), Maamoul (traditional food), music (new entertainment sector), gaming (youth culture). This is Saudi cultural branding in its modern form — celebrating both roots and aspirations simultaneously. 'يحتفل معكم' (celebrates with you) is inclusive language putting the brand alongside the people, not above them.

pattern_matches.notes: National Day 94 explicit; full illustrated campaign with Saudi cultural vocabulary
Full-frame illustrated graphic with 50% discount CTA tied to national occasion
Dense Saudi cultural references: astronaut, camel, Maamoul, Saudi Made — all in one frame
